tagline: A base that anyone with the URL can open from desktop or mobile.
heroTitle: Set up the public URL first, then grow the tool later
description: This base makes public hosting easy first, so UI design and concrete lab workflows can be added later without replacing the entry point.

modules.title: Attendance And Presence
modules.summary: Start with a simple list and manual updates, then expand to check-in history when needed.

modules.title: Lab Schedule
modules.summary: Add shared events, deadlines, seminars, and visitors on top of the same public shell.

modules.title: Equipment Booking
modules.summary: Use the same entry point later for room or equipment reservations.

principles: Make the shared URL usable before adding complex features.
Delay authentication and edit permissions until the need is clear.
Keep the frontend decoupled from any future API.
nextDecisions: Who can only view and who can edit.
Where data should live: browser storage, an API, or a database.
Whether editing should stay public-by-URL or become restricted.
notes: The app includes noindex and robots.txt to reduce accidental search discovery.
This is not strong security. Anyone with the URL can still open it.
A backend can be added later without replacing the current entry page.
